Off Calendar Sep-29-2004 Continued To Feb-04-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marshall C. Wallace, Esq., REED SMITH, 1999 Harrison Street, Suite 2400, Oakland, CA 94612, 510-466-6808, for defendant and moving party 1031 Exchange Options and VentureSmart. Robert P. Gates, ERSKINE & TULLEY, 220 Sansome Street, Suite 600, San francisco, CA 94104, 415-392-5431, plaintiff and opposing party on his own behalf.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling and SUSTAINED the demurer. The issue as to whether Defendant VentureSmart's demurrer would be sustained with or without leave to amend was argued. The Court took the issued under submission. Each side shall submit a proposed order. Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Reported by Beldon Yee (302/PB)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2004 Continued To Sep-09-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
